holdings.infoBox: SPYM is an equity ETF with a total of 509 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 7.82%, Apple at 6.70%, Microsoft at 4.55%, Amazon.com at 3.65%, and Alphabet at 3.31%.

overview.description: The State Street SPDR Portfolio S&P 500 ETF (SPYM) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P 500 index. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index of 500 large- and mid-cap US companies selected by the S&P Committee. SPYM was launched on Nov 8, 2005 and is issued by State Street.
